bounded-mixed-sign.description: A range spanning negative and positive.

fractional-bounds-positive.description: Fractional bounds that must be rounded: min=0.5 -> ceil -> 1, max=63.7 -> floor -> 63.

fractional-bounds-negative.description: Negative fractional bounds: min=-10.3 -> ceil -> -10, max=-0.1 -> floor -> -1.

no-format-unsigned.description: No format hint, non-negative range: should pick u8.

no-format-signed.description: No format hint, signed range: should pick i8.

no-format-large-unsigned.description: No format hint, large unsigned range: should pick u32.

exact-u8-match.description: Exact u8 bounds: should not produce a constrained newtype.

exact-nonzero-u8-match.description: min=1, max=255 matches NonZeroU8 exactly: should not produce a constrained newtype.

min-only-sub-range.description: Only a min bound, no max. min=10 with uint8 format.

max-only-sub-range.description: Only a max bound, no min. max=200 with uint8 format.

nonzero-with-max.description: min=1 with sub-range max: should be a constrained newtype, not NonZeroU8.

exclusive-integer-bounds.description: exclusiveMinimum=0, exclusiveMaximum=64 should produce min=1, max=63.

exclusive-fractional-bounds.description: exclusiveMinimum=0.5 should produce min=1, exclusiveMaximum=63.5 should produce max=63.

no-format-min1-with-max.description: No format, min=1, max=10: should be a constrained newtype, not NonZero.
